title: Cities With the Fastest Reply Times
subtitle: Average time to respond to a first message

items.name: Reykjavik
items.description: Icelanders waste no time. With a dating pool the size of a large office, every match counts.

items.name: Copenhagen
items.description: Danes reply fast, but only if you pass the vibe check. That first message better be good.

items.name: Oslo
items.description: Norwegians take a thoughtful pause. They are reading your bio twice before replying.

items.name: Helsinki
items.description: Finnish daters are deliberate. They reply eventually, and when they do, they mean it.

items.name: Stockholm
items.description: The capital of playing it cool. Stockholm takes its time, but the conversations tend to last longer.

title: Most Popular First-Date Spots
subtitle: Where Nordic daters go for that crucial first meeting

items.name: Coffee Shop
items.description: The undisputed champion. Low stakes, easy exit strategy, and you both have something to hold.

items.name: Bar / Wine Bar
items.description: Liquid courage has entered the chat. Evening dates at bars remain a rock-solid second choice.

items.name: Walk in a Park
items.description: The Nordic special. Free, scenic, and you can always blame the weather if you need to leave early.

items.name: Restaurant
items.description: A power move that signals serious intent. Or a very optimistic take on a stranger from the internet.

items.name: Museum / Gallery
items.description: The intellectual flex. Great for conversation starters, terrible for awkward silences echoing off marble floors.
